case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. MAKUL JUAN BAUTISTA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DEVENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, MAKUL JUAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON DEC-30-2024.
